title: Pep: City's crunch PL clash vs. Arsenal is a 'final'
summary: Manchester City closed the gap to Arsenal to just six points with a game in hand after a dominant 3-0 victory over Chelsea, making next week's clash between the two title contenders pivotal. Pep Guardiola described the Arsenal matchup as a "final," emphasizing its crucial importance in the title race.
content: Pep Guardiola said Manchester City's Premier League clash with Arsenal next week has become a "final" after a 3-0 win against Chelsea at Stamford Bridge moved his side to within six points, with a game in hand, of Mikel Arteta's league leaders.

zh.title: 佩普：曼城对阿森纳的英超关键战是'决赛'
zh.summary: 曼城在以3-0大胜切尔西后，将与阿森纳的积分差距缩小至6分，且还有一场待赛，这使得下周两支夺冠热门队的对阵变得至关重要。佩普·瓜迪奥拉将与阿森纳的比赛称为'决赛'，强调了其在争冠竞争中的关键作用。

title: Carrick: United in 'good place' on new Mainoo deal
summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick says negotiations with midfielder Kobbie Mainoo on a new long-term contract are progressing well. Carrick acknowledged that Champions League qualification would help retain key players like Mainoo.
content: Michael Carrick said a deal to tie down Kobbie Mainoo's long-term future is "getting closer" -- but admits securing Champions League football will help persuade players to commit to Manchester United.

zh.title: 卡里克：曼联与梅尼奥新约谈判处于'良好位置'
zh.summary: 曼联主教练迈克尔·卡里克表示，与中场球员科比·梅尼奥关于新长期合同的谈判进展顺利。卡里克承认，获得欧冠资格赛将有助于留住梅尼奥等关键球员。

title: Wilshere lands first trophy as Luton manager
summary: Jack Wilshere claimed his first managerial trophy after leading Luton to a 3-1 victory over Stockport in the EFL Trophy final. The win marks a significant early success in Wilshere's coaching career.
content: Jack Wilshere landed his first honour as a manager after Luton beat Stockport 3-1 in the final of the EFL Trophy.

zh.title: 威尔希尔作为卢顿主帅赢得首个奖杯
zh.summary: 杰克·威尔希尔在率领卢顿以3-1击败斯托克港赢得英足联杯决赛后，获得了他作为主教练的首个奖杯。这场胜利标志着威尔希尔教练生涯中的重大早期成功。

title: Argentina's Romero limps off Spurs' loss in tears
summary: Tottenham suffered a 1-0 defeat to Sunderland while Argentine defender Cristian Romero suffered an injury that forced him to leave the pitch in emotional distress. The loss raises concerns over both Spurs' form and Romero's fitness.
content: Tottenham defender Cristian Romero left the field in tears following an injury in his team's 1-0 loss to Sunderland in the Premier League on Sunday.

zh.title: 阿根廷罗梅罗在热刺失利中哭着离场
zh.summary: 托特纳姆在对桑德兰的比赛中以1-0落败，阿根廷后卫克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗遭受伤病，被迫在情绪激动中离开球场。这场失利引发了人们对热刺状态和罗梅罗健康状况的担忧。

title: Inter close on Serie A title as Como lose UCL place
summary: Inter Milan extended their Serie A lead to nine points with a remarkable 4-3 comeback victory from two goals down against Como. With six matches remaining, Inter are in a commanding position to secure the title.
content: Inter Milan came back from two goals down for a 4-3 victory at Como on Sunday and extended its Serie A lead to nine points with six rounds remaining.

zh.title: 国际米兰接近意甲冠军，科莫失去欧冠资格
zh.summary: 国际米兰以4-3的非凡逆转胜利击败科莫，领先优势扩大至9分。距离赛季结束还有6场比赛，国际米兰处于绝对领先地位，有望确保获得冠军。

title: Who will finish 18th in the Premier League this season?
summary: BBC pundits Ben Foster and Pat Nevin discuss their predictions for which team will finish in the Championship-bound 18th place in the Premier League this season. The analysis provides insight into which teams face the greatest relegation risk.
content: Match of the Day pundits Ben Foster and Pat Nevin have their say on which team they think are most likely to finish the season in 18th spot and be relegated from the Premier League.

zh.title: 本赛季英超谁将排名第18位？
zh.summary: BBC评论员本·福斯特和帕特·内文讨论了他们对英超本赛季哪支球队将排在会导致降级的第18位的预测。这个分析提供了对哪些球队面临最大降级风险的见解。

title: De Zerbi has a lot of work to do with Spurs - Nevin
summary: BBC pundit Pat Nevin analyzed Roberto de Zerbi's tactical setup in Tottenham's 1-0 loss to Sunderland, highlighting operational issues that suggest the new manager has significant work ahead. The defeat exposed defensive vulnerabilities in de Zerbi's early tenure.
content: Match of the Day pundit Pat Nevin looks at how Tottenham's new head coach Roberto de Zerbi set up his side against Sunderland, and the issues that cost Spurs in their 1-0 defeat at the Stadium of Light.

zh.title: 德泽比在热刺有大量工作要做 - 内文
zh.summary: 英国广播公司评论员帕特·内文分析了罗伯托·德泽比在热刺0-1输给桑德兰比赛中的战术部署，指出运营问题表明这位新经理面临重大挑战。这场失利暴露了德泽比早期执教中的防守漏洞。

title: How relentless Manchester City punished Chelsea
summary: Manchester City delivered a dominant second-half performance to defeat Chelsea 3-0 at Stamford Bridge, with BBC pundits praising their relentless attacking play. The victory demonstrates City's quality in crucial matches and keeps them in contention for the title.
content: Match of the Day pundits Ben Foster and Pat Nevin praise Manchester City's second-half performance as they overpower Chelsea to secure a 3-0 away win at Stamford Bridge.

zh.title: 不懈的曼城如何惩罚切尔西
zh.summary: 曼城队在斯坦福桥球场的下半场表现出色，以3-0击败切尔西，英国广播公司评论员称赞他们的不懈进攻。这场胜利展示了曼城队在关键比赛中的实力，使他们保持了争冠的希望。

title: New Mainoo deal closer, says Man Utd boss Carrick
summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick confirmed that midfielder Kobbie Mainoo is making progress toward signing a new long-term contract with the club. The development is positive for United's efforts to retain their key young talent.
content: Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo is getting closer to agreeing a new contract with the club, head coach Michael Carrick says.

zh.title: 新马伊诺协议更进一步，曼联老板卡里克表示
zh.summary: 曼联经理迈克尔·卡里克确认中场球员科比·马伊诺正在取得进展，即将与俱乐部签署新的长期合同。这一进展对曼联保留其关键年轻人才的努力是积极的。

title: Man City smell blood - why Arsenal should fear title rivals
summary: Manchester City capitalized on Arsenal's recent form dip to narrow the title gap to just six points, establishing themselves as genuine title contenders. Pep Guardiola's side's relentless form suggests Arsenal must improve their consistency to maintain their lead.
content: Manchester City capitalise on Arsenal's latest slip-up in style - and now Pep Guardiola's side must be feared as the Premier League title race hots up.

zh.title: 曼城嗅到血腥味 - 阿森纳为何应该害怕对手争冠
zh.summary: 曼城利用阿森纳近期状态下滑将积分差缩小至仅六分，确立了自己作为真正争冠者的地位。瓜迪奥拉的球队持续出色的状态表明阿森纳必须提高一致性以保持领先。

title: Ruthless Man City have Arsenal sweating ahead of title decider
summary: Manchester City's dominant display against Chelsea proves their ruthless approach to pursuing the title, with both teams showing they will fight hard for glory. The April 19 clash between City and Arsenal will be pivotal in determining the championship outcome.
content: Man City proved against Chelsea they will stop at nothing to win the Premier League. Can Arsenal match their intensity? The two teams meet on April 19.

zh.title: 无情的曼城让阿森纳在争冠决战前坐立不安
zh.summary: 曼城对切尔西的主导性表现证明了他们在争冠中无情的态度，两支球队都表明他们会为荣誉而奋力争取。4月19日曼城与阿森纳的对阵将是决定冠军归属的关键比赛。

title: Newcastle want Man Utd's Ugarte - Monday's gossip
summary: Newcastle United are interested in acquiring Manchester United midfielder Manuel Ugarte, while Liverpool face competition from Chelsea for young talent Eli Junior Kroupi. The transfer gossip reflects ongoing squad-building activity across elite clubs.
content: Newcastle want Manchester United's Manuel Ugarte, Liverpool face a battle with Chelsea for Eli Junior Kroupi, plus more.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔想要曼联的乌加特 - 周一的转会传闻
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队有意收购曼联中场球员曼努埃尔·乌加特，而利物浦在争夺年轻天才埃利·小尤尼奥尔·克鲁普伊时面临切尔西的竞争。转会传闻反映了精英俱乐部间持续的阵容建设活动。

title: 'I'm not blind' - Howe 'accountable' for loss after three-week break
summary: Newcastle manager Eddie Howe accepted responsibility for his side's loss to Crystal Palace following a three-week break from competition. Howe acknowledged the challenge of maintaining focus and fitness during extended periods without fixtures.
content: Eddie Howe says he is "accountable" for Newcastle's defeat by Crystal Palace after three weeks without a game.

zh.title: "我不是瞎子" - 霍夫对三周后的失利"负有责任"
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔主教练埃迪·霍夫在球队经历三周比赛中断后对阵水晶宫的失利中表示承担责任。霍夫承认在长时间没有比赛的情况下保持专注力和体能的挑战。

title: Chelsea need to improve their resilience - Rosenior
summary: Chelsea manager Liam Rosenior acknowledged his team's lack of resilience in challenging moments following losses that have threatened their Champions League qualification hopes. Chelsea must secure a victory against Manchester United to maintain their top-four ambitions.
content: Chelsea manager Liam Rosenior admits his side need to "improve their resilience in difficult moments" and focus on winning their next league game against Manchester United to stay in contention for a Champions League spot.

zh.title: 切尔西需要提高韧性 - 罗森纳约
zh.summary: 切尔西主教练利亚姆·罗森纳约承认他的球队在困难时刻缺乏韧性，这些失利威胁了他们的欧冠资格希望。切尔西必须击败曼联以维持他们的前四目标。

title: Man City make statement in dominant win over Chelsea
summary: Manchester City overwhelmed Chelsea with three goals in a 17-minute burst to win 3-0 and cut Arsenal's lead to six points with an extra game to play. The dominant performance underscores City's title credentials as the race intensifies.
content: Manchester City put three goals past Chelsea in a 17-minute spell at Stamford Bridge, to close the gap on leaders Arsenal to six points with a game in hand in the Premier League.

zh.title: 曼城在压倒性胜利中做出声明
zh.summary: 曼城在17分钟内攻入三球，以3-0击败切尔西，将阿森纳的领先优势缩小到六分（还有额外一场比赛待赛）。这场压倒性的表现彰显了曼城在争冠加剧之际的冠军实力。

title: Relegation looks increasingly inevitable for slumping Spurs
summary: Spurs have dropped into the Premier League relegation zone, raising the alarming prospect that one of England's biggest clubs could actually be relegated this season.
content: Now that Spurs have dropped into the relegation zone, there is a dawning realization that one of the Premier League's Big Six might actually go down.

zh.title: 降级对低迷的热刺来说看起来越来越不可避免
zh.summary: 热刺队已经降入英超降级区，引发了令人担忧的前景，即英格兰最大的俱乐部之一可能会在本赛季被降级。

title: Man City trounce Chelsea, cut Arsenal's lead to 6
summary: Manchester City defeated Chelsea 3-0 at Stamford Bridge to close the gap on Premier League leaders Arsenal to six points, intensifying the title race.
content: Manchester City's pursuit of the Premier League title gained momentum with a dominant 3-0 win over Chelsea at Stamford Bridge which cut the gap at the top to six points.

zh.title: 曼城大胜切尔西，将阿森纳的领先优势缩小到6分

title: Brady kids Wrexham owners over Birmingham win
summary: Tom Brady taunted Wrexham owners Rob Reynolds and Ryan Mac after Birmingham City's 2-0 Championship victory, highlighting the entertainment value of competing against friends.
content: Tom Brady teased Wrexham owners Rob Reynolds and Ryan Mac after Birmingham's 2-0 victory in the Championship on Sunday, saying "it's always more fun to beat your friends."

zh.title: 布雷迪因伯明翰胜利而嘲笑雷克瑟姆老板
zh.summary: 在伯明翰城队以2:0战胜英冠后，汤姆·布雷迪嘲笑雷克瑟姆的老板罗布·雷诺兹和瑞恩·麦克，凸显了与朋友竞争的娱乐价值。

title: Spurs lose De Zerbi's first game, stay in drop zone
summary: Roberto De Zerbi's debut as Tottenham manager ended in a 1-0 defeat to Sunderland, leaving his side in the Premier League's bottom three.
content: Roberto De Zerbi's first game in charge of Tottenham ended in defeat after they were beaten 1-0 by Sunderland at the Stadium of Light.

zh.title: 热刺输掉德泽尔比首场比赛，仍在降级区
zh.summary: 罗伯托·德泽尔比作为托特纳姆热刺主帅的首场比赛以0:1不敌桑德兰告终，球队仍在英超降级区。

title: Bruno: Not about money, I want to compete at Utd
summary: Bruno Fernandes reaffirmed his commitment to winning trophies at Manchester United, stressing that competitive success rather than financial rewards drives his motivation.
content: Bruno Fernandes says that winning trophies, not money, is his motivation -- and that is what he wants to do at Manchester United.

zh.title: 布鲁诺：不是为了钱，我想在曼联竞争
zh.summary: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯重申了自己在曼联赢得奖杯的承诺，强调竞争成功而非经济回报驱动他的动力。

title: Arteta: Tiredness not an excuse for Arsenal woes
summary: Mikel Arteta rejected fatigue as an excuse for Arsenal's performance following their loss to Bournemouth, urging players to rediscover their competitive enjoyment.
content: Mikel Arteta said Arsenal must not use fatigue as an excuse following their defeat against Bournemouth as he challenged his players to rediscover their "enjoyment" of the game.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔：疲劳不是阿森纳困境的借口
zh.summary: 米克尔·阿尔特塔否认疲劳是阿森纳输给伯恩茅斯后表现不佳的借口，敦促球员重新找到竞争的乐趣。

title: Van Dijk backs Liverpool fans' ticket protest 'right'
summary: Virgil van Dijk publicly supported Liverpool fans' protests against ticket price increases, calling on the club to address concerns that benefit nobody.
content: Virgil van Dijk has said Liverpool fans have a "right" to protest against ticket price rises and urged the club to find a solution as the current situation "benefits no one."

zh.title: 范迪克支持利物浦球迷反对门票涨价的权利
zh.summary: 维尔吉尔·范迪克公开支持利物浦球迷对门票价格上涨的抗议，呼吁俱乐部解决对任何人都没有好处的担忧。

title: Premier League recap: Man City steamroll Chelsea to send title race into high gear
summary: Manchester City's dominant 3-0 victory over Chelsea significantly tightens the Premier League title race, reducing Arsenal's lead to just six points.
content: null

title: Will Romero's tears become the enduring image of Tottenham's season?
summary: Cristian Romero's tearful reaction to Tottenham's defeat at Sunderland may become the defining image of the club's season if they are relegated.
content: Cristian Romero's tears at Sunderland could prove the lasting image of Tottenham's season if it ends with relegation, writes Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 罗梅罗的眼泪会成为热刺本赛季的永恒形象吗？

title: Will thrilling Scottish title race be decided on goal difference?
summary: Rangers' 6-3 win over Falkirk extends their lead over Hearts and Celtic in a tight Scottish Premiership title race that could be decided by goal difference.
content: Rangers' 6-3 win over Falkirk extends the Ibrox side's advantage over leaders Heart of Midlothian and Celtic should the Scottish Premiership title be decided on goal difference.

zh.title: 激烈的苏格兰争冠战会因进球数差决出胜负吗？
zh.summary: 流浪者队以6:3击败法尔柯克，扩大了对心脏队和凯尔特人队的领先优势。在激烈的苏超争冠战中，冠军可能因进球差而决出。

title: Newcastle defeat to Palace 'deflating' - Howe
summary: Newcastle United dropped to 14th place after a 2-1 loss to Crystal Palace, with manager Eddie Howe critical of a controversial late penalty decision.
content: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe says his sides 2-1 defeat by Crystal Palace was "deflating" and calls the decision to award a late penalty against them "soft", as The Magpies fall to 14th in the Premier League.

title: Villa are 'motivated and excited' by Champions League prospect - Emery
summary: Aston Villa remain motivated by their Champions League qualification prospects after drawing 1-1 with Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.
content: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery says his side are feeling "motivated and excited" at the prospect of qualifying for the Champions League next season, after their 1-1 draw away to Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

title: Palace kept believing in Newcastle win - Glasner
summary: Crystal Palace's 2-1 win over Newcastle, featuring a late double from Jean-Philippe Mateta, gives Oliver Glasner momentum as he seeks to maintain the team's forward progress.
content: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner says he wants to keep his team's forward momentum going after Jean-Philippe Mateta came off the bench to score a late double in their 2-1 win over Newcastle United in the Premier League.

zh.title: 水晶宫保持信心击败纽卡斯尔 - 格拉斯纳
zh.summary: 水晶宫2-1战胜纽卡斯尔，让-菲利普·马特塔在比赛后期梅开二度，这给主教练奥利弗·格拉斯纳注入了动力，他希望继续保持球队的进步势头。

title: Tottenham players don't need a coach - De Zerbi
summary: Roberto De Zerbi indicated he must adopt a mentor and father-figure role with Tottenham's players following their opening defeat to Sunderland in the bottom three.
content: Tottenham manager Roberto De Zerbi says he needs to be a "big brother" and "father" figure to his players after their 1-0 defeat at Sunderland in his first game in charge leaves his side in the bottom three of the Premier League.

zh.title: 热刺球员不需要教练 - 德泽比

title: Top 10 is a good target for Sunderland - Le Bris
summary: Sunderland manager Regis le Bris set a top-half finish as a realistic target after their 1-0 win over Tottenham moved them to 10th place in the Premier League.
content: Sunderland manager Regis le Bris believes his side can secure a top half finish in the table come the end of the season, after Sunderland's 1-0 win over Tottenham Hotspur moved them to 10th in the Premier League.

zh.summary: 桑德兰主教练雷吉斯·勒布里斯在1-0击败热刺并升至英超第十位后，将冲击上半区作为一个现实的目标。

title: Bruno Fernandes, Player of the Year? The case for Man United's talisman
summary: Bruno Fernandes has delivered his finest performances yet in the 2025-26 season, establishing himself as Manchester United's indispensable leader both as captain and midfielder. The discussion around whether he deserves Player of the Year recognition reflects his consistent excellence and crucial role in United's campaign.
content: The 2025-26 season has been a tale of two Brunos, and it has produced the best football yet from Manchester United's star midfielder and captain.

zh.title: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯能成为年度球员吗？曼联魔笛的案例

title: Transfer rumors, news: Carrick pushing for Man United to sign Rogers
summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick has identified Morgan Rogers as a priority transfer target for the upcoming summer window. The recommendation signals Carrick's tactical vision for strengthening United's squad in the next transfer period.
content: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick has recommended Morgan Rogers as a target this summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传闻：卡里克力推曼联签下罗杰斯
zh.summary: 曼联主帅迈克尔·卡里克已将摩根·罗杰斯列为即将到来的夏季转会窗口的优先目标。这一推荐反映了卡里克为曼联补强阵容的战术意图。

title: Farke says FA Cup buzz can lift Leeds for relegation fight
summary: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke believes the momentum from FA Cup competition can provide a psychological boost rather than distraction amid their Premier League relegation struggle. Farke's outlook suggests the team can harness cup success to strengthen their survival bid.
content: Leeds United head coach Daniel Farke dismisses suggestions the FA Cup could distract his side from their Premier League relegation battle, as they prepare to face Manchester United.

zh.title: 法克表示足总杯的热度能助利兹渡过保级难关

title: Union Berlin appoint first female boss in Europe's top men's leagues
summary: Marie-Louise Eta has made history by becoming the first woman appointed as head coach of a men's team in one of Europe's top five leagues, taking the interim role at Bundesliga side Union Berlin. This milestone represents a significant breakthrough for gender diversity in elite men's football management.
content: Marie-Louise Eta becomes the first woman appointed to manage a men's team in one of Europe's top five leagues as she is named interim head coach of Bundesliga side Union Berlin.

zh.title: 联合柏林任命欧洲顶级男子联赛首位女性主教练
zh.summary: 玛丽-路易丝·埃塔创造了历史，成为欧洲五大联赛中首位被任命为男子球队主教练的女性，她在德甲联赛球队联合柏林担任代理主教练。这一里程碑标志着性别多样性在精英男子足球管理中取得了重大突破。

title: Tottenham will go down - Sutton
summary: Pundit Chris Sutton believes Tottenham face the threat of relegation, with debate over whether new manager Roberto de Zerbi can reverse their form and keep them in the Premier League. His comments reflect serious concerns about Spurs' current trajectory.
content: Football Focus pundits Chris Sutton and Steph Houghton discuss whether Roberto de Zerbi can improve Spurs and keep them in the Premier League.

zh.title: 热刺将降级 - 萨顿
zh.summary: 评论员克里斯·萨顿认为热刺面临降级威胁，人们对新主教练罗伯托·德·泽尔比是否能够扭转球队战绩并将其留在英超的问题进行了讨论。他的评论反映了人们对热刺目前发展轨迹的严重担忧。

title: What is going on with Garnacho?
summary: Alejandro Garnacho is struggling to make an impact at Chelsea following his £40m transfer from Manchester United, raising questions about his ability to fulfill his potential at Stamford Bridge. The young winger's slow start highlights adaptation challenges for high-profile signings.
content: Alejandro Garnacho is struggling to stand out at Chelsea - so can the £40m signing from Manchester United still realise his potential at Stamford Bridge?

zh.title: 加纳乔现在怎么样了？
zh.summary: 亚历杭德罗·加纳乔在从曼联以4000万英镑转会切尔西后，努力在球队中产生影响，引发了人们对他是否能够在斯坦福桥实现潜力的质疑。这位年轻边锋的缓慢开局突出了高调引援的适应挑战。

title: Wales told to show up in Albania qualifiers
summary: Wales coach Rhian Wilkinson is demanding her team deliver a strong showing in their Women's World Cup qualifying double-header against Albania as they battle to finish top of their group. The result will be crucial for Wales' path toward World Cup qualification.
content: Rhian Wilkinson tells Wales they must "show up" in their Women's World Cup qualifying double-header against Albania in bid to finish top of group.

zh.title: 威尔士被要求在阿尔巴尼亚预选赛中展现实力
zh.summary: 威尔士主教练里昂·威尔金森要求她的球队在与阿尔巴尼亚的女子世界杯预选赛两回合中表现出色，因为她们争取在小组中名列前茅。这个结果对威尔士争夺世界杯资格的道路至关重要。

title: Messi denied late, Miami still winless at new home
summary: Inter Miami drew 2-2 with the New York Red Bulls despite Lionel Messi seeing a late free kick saved, extending their winless streak at their new stadium. The result highlights Miami's ongoing struggles at their new venue despite having one of football's greatest players.
content: Lionel Messi had a free kick saved in stoppage time as Inter Miami drew 2-2 with the New York Red Bulls on Saturday to remain without a win at its new stadium.

zh.title: 梅西遭拒，迈阿密新主场仍未胜
zh.summary: 国际迈阿密与纽约红牛队2:2战平，尽管莱昂内尔·梅西的后期任意球被扑出，但球队在新球场的不胜纪录仍在延续。这个结果突显了迈阿密尽管拥有足球史上最伟大球员之一，但在新主场仍然面临困境。

title: Eta becomes 1st woman to lead Bundesliga team
summary: Marie-Louise Eta has become the first woman coach to lead a men's team in the Bundesliga, appointed by Union Berlin as they fight for league survival. Her appointment represents a significant milestone for gender representation in top-tier European football.
content: Union Berlin have appointed Marie-Louise Eta as the first woman coach in charge of a men's team in the Bundesliga as they bids to ensure their league survival.

zh.title: 埃塔成为德甲首位女性主教练
zh.summary: 玛丽-路易丝·埃塔被柏林联合任命为首位执教德甲男子球队的女性教练，帮助球队争取联赛保级。她的任命在欧洲顶级足球中代表了性别代表性的重大里程碑。

title: Follow live: Messi, Miami seek first win at new stadium
summary: Inter Miami CF debuts their new stadium looking to achieve their first victory at the new venue, with Lionel Messi leading the team. The match represents a significant milestone for the franchise.
content: null

zh.title: 直播：梅西、迈阿密在新球场寻求首场胜利
zh.summary: 国际迈阿密足球俱乐部在新球场首次亮相，力求在新场地实现首场胜利，由莱昂内尔·梅西领导球队。这场比赛对该俱乐部来说是一个重要的里程碑。

title: Lavelle leads U.S. past Japan for 10th straight win
summary: Rose Lavelle scored and assisted as the United States defeated Japan 2-1 on Saturday. The victory marks the U.S. team's 10th consecutive win against Japan in their series.
content: Rose Lavelle had a goal and an assist and the United States won the first of three matches against Japan 2-1 on Saturday.

zh.title: 拉韦尔率领美国击败日本实现十连胜
zh.summary: 罗丝·拉韦尔进球并助攻，美国队在周六以2-1击败日本队。这次胜利标志着美国队对日本队的十连胜。

title: Barça go 9 points clear but insist title not won yet
summary: Barcelona defeated Espanyol 4-1 to extend their LaLiga lead to nine points over Real Madrid with seven matches remaining. Despite the commanding position, manager Hansi Flick emphasized the title race is not yet decided.
content: Hansi Flick says the LaLiga title is not won yet despite seeing his Barcelona team thump Espanyol 4-1 on Saturday to move nine points clear of Real Madrid with just seven games to play.

zh.title: 巴萨领先9分但坚持冠军还未确定
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那以4-1击败西班牙人队，将他们在西甲的领先优势扩大到距皇家马德里9分，还剩七场比赛。尽管处于领先地位，主教练汉西·弗利克强调冠军争夺还未结束。

title: Pulisic's Milan jeered off after shock Udinese loss
summary: AC Milan suffered a shocking 3-0 home defeat to Udinese on Saturday, falling out of the Serie A title race. The loss has left the club concerned about defending their position against teams below them in the standings.
content: After falling out of the Serie A title race, AC Milan is looking nervously at the teams behind it following a shock 3-0 loss at home to Udinese on Saturday.

zh.title: 普利西奇领衔的米兰队在乌迪内斯意外失利后遭嘘声
zh.summary: AC米兰周六在主场以0:3惨败乌迪内斯,跌出意甲争冠行列。这场失利令俱乐部担忧自己能否防守住在联赛中的位置,尤其是面对排名靠后的球队时。

title: Slot hails 'special' Ngumoha after Salah-like goal
summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot praised 17-year-old Rio Ngumoha after the teen set up the team's 2-0 victory over Fulham. Slot compared Ngumoha's performance to that of Mohamed Salah, suggesting the youngster has significant potential.
content: Arne Slot compared Rio Ngumoha to Mohamed Salah after the 17-year-old set Liverpool on the way to a 2-0 victory over Fulham on Saturday.

zh.title: 斯洛特赞赏"特别"的恩古莫哈的"萨拉赫式进球"
zh.summary: 利物浦主帅阿尔内·斯洛特在17岁新星里奥·恩古莫哈助攻球队2:0战胜富勒姆后对其大加赞赏。斯洛特将恩古莫哈的表现与穆罕默德·萨拉赫进行了比较,暗示这位年轻球员具有巨大潜力。

title: Ronaldo scores as Al Nassr set record win streak
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo scored in Al Nassr's 2-0 victory over Al Okhdood on Saturday. The win extended Al Nassr's record winning streak and maintained their comfortable lead at the top of the Saudi Pro League standings.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo found the net as Al Nassr claimed a 2-0 victory over Al Okhdood on Saturday to extend their lead at the top of the Saudi Pro League standings.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多破门,阿尔纳斯尔创造连胜纪录
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多周六在阿尔纳斯尔2:0战胜奥赫杜德的比赛中进球。这场胜利延续了阿尔纳斯尔的创纪录连胜纪录,并保持了他们在沙特职业联赛积分榜榜首的舒适领先优势。
